steps.title: Use the cosine ratio
steps.content:
Cosine compares the adjacent side to the hypotenuse for the marked angle. Here, $KL$ is adjacent to angle $y^\circ$, and the hypotenuse is $59$.
$$\frac{KL}{59}=\frac{58}{59}$$

steps.title: Solve for the side length
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $59$. $$KL=58$$ The answer is 58.
